longevityScore: Numeric source values from 0-10 are kept as-is.
Numeric source values from 0-5 are multiplied by 2.
Non-numeric or unsupported categorical inputs are rejected and left empty.
sillageScore: Numeric source values from 0-10 are kept as-is.
Numeric source values from 0-5 are multiplied by 2.
Non-numeric or unsupported categorical inputs are rejected and left empty.
versatilityScore: Numeric source values from 0-10 are kept as-is.
Numeric source values from 0-5 are multiplied by 2.
Non-numeric or unsupported categorical inputs are rejected and left empty.

sourceAudit.reason: Canonical verified enrichment entrypoint now delegates to adapters, field policy, provenance, and review queue generation.
Canonical enrichment orchestrator applying adapter search results, field policy, provenance, and review queue output.
Canonical field map, source priority, overwrite rules, and conflict policy.
Shared adapter contract and reusable matching primitives.
Shared normalize and validate stage remains the base of the enrichment pipeline.
Canonical row normalization and CSV export mapping remain authoritative.
Canonical validation rules are reused before enrichment and after export verification.
DB import still accepts enriched CSVs because extra provenance columns are safely ignored.
Shared types now model adapter coverage, field-level provenance, and review queue items.
Canonical DB import entrypoint remains the downstream consumer for verified catalog exports.
Synthetic dataset; excluded from trusted enrichment and left documented as untrusted.
Trusted local Parfumo snapshot used for conservative verified enrichment matches.
Trusted local Parfumo snapshot used for conservative verified enrichment matches.
Trusted local Parfumo snapshot used for conservative verified enrichment matches.
Historical append workflow superseded by the reusable Parfumo source adapter.
Historical collection helper; not part of the maintained adapter-based enrichment pipeline.
Placeholder adapter; not implemented until a trusted Fragrantica ingestion path exists.
Placeholder adapter for future official-site integrations; no trusted local ingestion path exists yet.
